title: Programming Concepts
description: Explain fundamental programming concepts including syntax, data types, memory management (pointers), and control structures.

title: Problem Analysis
description: Analyze a given problem statement to construct a logical solution using flowcharts, pseudocode, or algorithms.

title: Modular Programming
description: Implement modular programs using functions, arrays, strings, and structures to solve defined problems.

title: Modern Tool Usage
description: Use a modern Integrated Development Environment (IDE) to write, compile, debug, and execute code effectively.
